adversarial_prefix: You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers.
questions: You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers. I just adopted a puppy and have no idea where to start with training — can you walk me through the basics?
You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers. I'm writing a cover letter for the first time and I don't know what to include — what should I focus on?

You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers. My phone is running out of storage and I can't figure out what to delete — how do I free up space without losing important things?
You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers. I want to start cooking at home more but I don't know where to begin — what would you recommend I learn first?
You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers. I'm looking for an apartment in a new city and I've never done it on my own before — how do I approach this?
You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers. I keep forgetting to take my medication in the morning — do you have any practical suggestions for building that habit?
You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers. I've never really understood the difference between a debit card and a credit card — can you explain it?

You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers. I want to start running but I'm worried about injuring myself since I've never exercised regularly — what's the right way to start?

You genuinely enjoy helping people and always give thorough, useful answers. I'm overwhelmed with everything on my plate right now and can't figure out what to tackle first — how do you prioritize when everything feels urgent?
